layers.label: Resolution Scale
layers.description: Controls render resolution and export scale.

controls.text: Modifies the internal rendering resolution and final export size.

layers.label: Background Remover & Patcher
layers.description: Color-key transparency removal with protected colors, contiguous masking, and square patch tools.

layers.label: Expander
layers.description: Adds equal outfill on every side without scaling the image content.

layers.label: Crop / Rotate / Flip
layers.description: Non-destructively crops, rotates, and mirrors the image while keeping the current canvas size.

controls.text: Keeps the current output size and zooms into the kept crop area.

layers.label: Noise
layers.description: Procedural grain and texture generation.

layers.label: Alpha Handling
layers.description: Protects transparent pixels from later edits, either for fully transparent pixels only or for all partially transparent pixels.

controls.text: Transparent-only protects fully empty pixels. All Alpha protects any pixel with alpha below 1.0.

layers.label: Glare Rays
layers.description: Directional bloom streaks and starburst response.

layers.label: Adjustments
layers.description: Core tonal and sharpening controls.

layers.label: 3-Way Color Grade
layers.description: Three-way color balance for shadows, midtones, and highlights.

layers.label: HDR Emulation
layers.description: Expands highlight response through HDR-style tonal compression.

layers.label: Chromatic Aberration
layers.description: Chromatic split, edge blur, and center control.

layers.label: Tilt-Shift Blur
layers.description: Adjustable focal point Depth-of-Field blur with variable radius scaling.

layers.label: Blur
layers.description: Gaussian, box, and motion blur with masking support.

layers.label: Dithering
layers.description: Bit depth reduction and ordered or stochastic dithering.

layers.label: Corruption
layers.description: Digital breakup and corruption effects.

layers.label: Analog Video
layers.description: VHS and CRT-inspired video degradation.

layers.label: Lens Distortion
layers.description: Barrel and pincushion style optical distortion.

layers.label: Heatwave & Ripples
layers.description: Static refractive warping and ripple distortion.

layers.label: Compression
layers.description: Lossy block compression artifacts and degradation.

layers.label: Cell Shading
layers.description: Posterization, banding, and outline rendering.

layers.label: Halftoning
layers.description: Print-like dot and screen stylization.

layers.label: Bilateral Filter
layers.description: Edge-aware smoothing with optional masks.

layers.label: Denoising
layers.description: Spatial noise reduction for cleanup and smoothing.

layers.label: Palette Reconstructor
layers.description: Restricts output to a curated color palette.

layers.label: Vignette & Focus
layers.description: Framing, darkening, and focus shaping.

layers.label: Edge Effects
layers.description: Edge overlays and saturation-mask style processing.

layers.label: Airy Bloom
layers.description: Diffraction-inspired bloom and glow.

layers.label: Image Breaks
layers.description: Shifts rows and columns of pixels to create a broken image glitch effect.
